title: Spotted : Little Edition

body:
It really will never get old. Love seeing everything you all create with our products. Found little projects using all the lines I have collaborated on with American Crafts - Ready Set Go (which is 25% off for a limited time!), Sketchbook and the original one that just went by Amy Tangerine. Here's what has caught my eye lately:

Updated: Two Peas In A Bucket is actually having a big 25% off sale on all Hot Products! Happy shopping!
